page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.medium is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance within the ecs.s3 server family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing a total of 4 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 4.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 1.0 GB of RAM per CPU core.

This server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external network storage attachments for operating system and data volumes. The CPU architecture lacks advanced instruction set extensions such as Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX, AVX-512), Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), and hardware-accelerated cryptography (AES, SHA).

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation provides predictable compute performance without resource contention, though the low memory-to-CPU ratio limits its use to memory-light workloads. Appropriate workloads include basic web serving, lightweight computational tasks, microservices, and development environments that require dedicated CPU execution but have minimal memory footprints.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.medium is an x86_64 virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor, featuring 4 dedicated physical CPU cores with a single thread per core. It is configured with 4.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 1:1 ratio of gigabytes of RAM per vCPU. The hardware profile lacks local storage, integrated GPUs, and advanced CPU instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512, AMX, or hardware-accelerated cryptography. This instance offers a cost-efficient option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without the overhead of hyperthreading, though it is constrained by its low memory capacity. It is best suited for lightweight computational tasks, basic web serving, microservices, and memory-light utility applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s3.medium is a KVM-based x86_64 virtual server featuring 4 dedicated CPU cores, 4.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for memory-light computational workloads.

tagline: A dedicated four-core virtual server with a low memory footprint designed for lightweight, compute-focused utility workloads.
